历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 4247, moved forward to 3879 in 2024, and significantly shifted backward to 6864 in 2025, with drastic fluctuations in recent two years. The 2025 baseline is about 6864. The provincial science enrollment plan was 31 in 2023, 37 in 2024, and 43 in 2025, showing continuous expansion. The 2026 plan is 44, a slight increase of 1 student compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 2.3%, having limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked approximately 60th in 2026, with a slight decline in recent years (from 43rd in 2021 to 60th in 2026), but still among the top 100 nationally. The reputation evaluation in 2026 is clearly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (such as dean's paper fraud), which may have a slight inhibitory effect on some candidates' application psychology. On Douyin, it is relatively hot (ranked 48th overall), with a certain level of attention. No obvious enrollment gaps have been recorded. Sociology is rated A, and World History is rated A-, representing its advantageous disciplines. The Liberal Arts Experimental Class (including Philosophy, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism, etc.) is closely related to its advantageous disciplines. Among the broad science enrollment categories, engineering majors such as Electronic Information and Electrical Engineering, though not receiving A-level evaluations, have strong social demand.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electronic Information/Communication and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended, Computer Science is recommended, and Materials (Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials) are clearly discouraged. The total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 238,000, a significant increase of approximately 211% compared to 2025 (about 76,500). Based on historical proportions, it is estimated that there are about 163,000 science candidates, leading to intensified competition. Compared to 2024's 390 points, the admission threshold has increased. Shanghai University is located in Shanghai, with strong regional appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the volatile trend of a significant ranking shift backward in 2025, the sharp increase in the number of provincial candidates in 2026 (intensified competition), the slight expansion of the enrollment plan (limited impact), and the negative reputation (slight inhibition), competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 6864. The predicted minimum ranking is about 7000, with a range of 6500–7500.

For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 6500), focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular majors.
